title: CBAM Exposure Check
description: Calculates the financial exposure and operational risk from the EU Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM) for industrial facilities, incorporating production efficiency, carbon intensity, and compliance readiness.

inputs.label: Annual Production Volume
inputs.businessContext: Total output of the primary product (e.g., steel, cement, aluminum) in metric tons per year.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total output of the primary product (e.g., steel, cement, aluminum) in metric tons per year.

inputs.label: Carbon Intensity
inputs.businessContext: Direct and indirect greenhouse gas emissions per ton of product, based on ISO 14064 or GHG Protocol.

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct and indirect greenhouse gas emissions per ton of product, based on ISO 14064 or GHG Protocol.

inputs.label: CBAM Carbon Price
inputs.businessContext: Expected or current EU ETS allowance price used for CBAM certificate calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected or current EU ETS allowance price used for CBAM certificate calculation.

inputs.label: Free Allocation Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of emissions covered by free allowances under CBAM transitional rules.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of emissions covered by free allowances under CBAM transitional rules.

inputs.label: Production Efficiency Index
inputs.businessContext: Overall equipment effectiveness (OEE) or similar lean metric; higher values reduce waste and emissions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Overall equipment effectiveness (OEE) or similar lean metric; higher values reduce waste and emissions.

inputs.label: Compliance Readiness Score
inputs.businessContext: Assessment of data collection, reporting systems, and verification readiness per CBAM requirements.

businessContext_i18n.en: Assessment of data collection, reporting systems, and verification readiness per CBAM requirements.

inputs.label: Industry Benchmark Intensity
inputs.businessContext: Best available technology (BAT) or sector average carbon intensity for benchmarking (ISO 50001).

businessContext_i18n.en: Best available technology (BAT) or sector average carbon intensity for benchmarking (ISO 50001).

inputs.label: Emission Scope
inputs.businessContext: Defines which emission scopes are included in the carbon intensity calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Defines which emission scopes are included in the carbon intensity calculation.

inputs.label: Use Verified Data Only
inputs.businessContext: If true, only data from verified sources (e.g., accredited verifier) is used; otherwise estimated data may be included.

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, only data from verified sources (e.g., accredited verifier) is used; otherwise estimated data may be included.

rules.message: Carbon intensity exceeds industry benchmark. Consider efficiency improvements to reduce CBAM exposure.
Production efficiency index is below 0.7. Lean Six Sigma initiatives recommended to improve OEE.
Compliance readiness score is low. Immediate investment in data management and verification systems required.
High free allocation may mask true exposure. Re-evaluate allocation assumptions.

thresholds.message: CBAM cost per ton exceeds 50 EUR – high financial risk.
Critical efficiency level – immediate action required.

formulas.label: Total Emissions
formulas.description: Annual total CO2e emissions from production.

formulas.label: Exposed Emissions
formulas.description: Emissions subject to CBAM certificate purchase.

formulas.label: CBAM Cost per Ton Product
formulas.description: Financial exposure per ton of product due to CBAM.

formulas.label: Efficiency Adjusted Cost
formulas.description: CBAM cost adjusted for production efficiency (lean principle).

formulas.label: Compliance Risk Factor
formulas.description: Multiplier reflecting data quality and readiness risk.

formulas.label: Total CBAM Exposure (Primary Result)
formulas.description: Risk-adjusted total financial exposure from CBAM, incorporating efficiency and compliance factors.

primary.label: Total CBAM Exposure
primary.description: Risk-adjusted total financial exposure from CBAM.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Low Efficiency Waste
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Additional emissions due to production efficiency below 1.0 (lean waste).

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Benchmark Gap
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Excess emissions compared to industry benchmark (ISO 50001).

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Compliance Data Gap
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Potential additional cost due to unverified or missing data.

suggestedActions.label: Improve Overall Equipment Effectiveness
suggestedActions.description: Implement Lean Six Sigma to reduce waste and increase efficiency index above 0.85.

suggestedActions.label: Reduce Carbon Intensity
suggestedActions.description: Adopt BAT and renewable energy to lower intensity towards industry benchmark.

suggestedActions.label: Enhance Compliance Data System
suggestedActions.description: Invest in automated data collection and third-party verification to raise readiness score above 80.

suggestedActions.label: Optimize Free Allocation Strategy
suggestedActions.description: Review allocation methodology and consider early investment in low-carbon processes.
